metadata.description: Claude Code governance plugins for TypeScript, Expo, NestJS, CDK, and Rails projects

plugins.name: lisa
plugins.description: Universal governance — agents, skills, commands, hooks, and rules for all projects

plugins.name: lisa-typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript hooks — formatting, linting, and ast-grep scanning on edit

plugins.name: lisa-expo
plugins.description: Expo/React Native skills, agents, and rules

plugins.name: lisa-nestjs
plugins.description: NestJS skills (GraphQL, TypeORM)

plugins.name: lisa-cdk
plugins.description: AWS CDK plugin

plugins.name: lisa-harper-fabric
plugins.description: Harper/Fabric-specific rules for TypeScript component apps (Claude + Codex)

plugins.name: lisa-phaser
plugins.description: Phaser 4 game-development rules, skills, and enforcement for TypeScript projects (Claude + Codex)

plugins.name: lisa-rails
plugins.description: Ruby on Rails skills, rules, and conventions

plugins.name: lisa-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki — git-native markdown knowledge base: ingest, query, lint, onboard (Claude + Codex)

plugins.name: lisa-openclaw
plugins.description: Connect staff to Telegram or Slack via OpenClaw — facilitator/specialist routing and repo-coding topics (Claude + Codex)

plugins.name: lisa-cursor
plugins.description: Cursor (cursor-agent) variant — skills and agents consumed via Cursor's native .claude-plugin loader

plugins.name: lisa-agy
plugins.description: Antigravity (agy) variant — bare-manifest plugin with skills and agents; rules baked into AGENTS.md since agy plugin hooks don't fire

plugins.name: lisa-copilot
plugins.description: GitHub Copilot variant — agents emitted as <name>.agent.md with camelCase hook events

plugins.name: lisa-cdk-agy
plugins.description: Antigravity (agy) variant — AWS CDK plugin
